nasb.text: and they took him and threw him into the pit. Now the pit was empty, without any water in it.

esv.text: And they took him and threw him into a pit. The pit was empty; there was no water in it.

cnv.text: 他們拿住約瑟，把他丟在枯井裡。那井是空的，裡面沒有水。

ccb.text: 把他扔到井里。当时，那口井是干的，没有水。

csbs.text: 然后抓住他，把他丢到坑里。那坑是空的，里面没有水。
